# Sanitized Horizon fixtures

These public Testnet fixtures were captured from the following authoritative Horizon endpoints for transaction `53f3c15e494c407732a88e4eda689a948b6ac8d5baf0aa082fc1412c69db54c7`:

- `https://horizon-testnet.stellar.org/transactions/53f3c15e494c407732a88e4eda689a948b6ac8d5baf0aa082fc1412c69db54c7`
- `https://horizon-testnet.stellar.org/transactions/53f3c15e494c407732a88e4eda689a948b6ac8d5baf0aa082fc1412c69db54c7/operations`
- `https://horizon-testnet.stellar.org/transactions/53f3c15e494c407732a88e4eda689a948b6ac8d5baf0aa082fc1412c69db54c7/effects`

Only fields needed to verify transaction identity, success, account ownership, asset orientation, exact amounts, operation type, and timestamp are retained. Links, signatures, XDR, fee metadata, and unrelated liquidity-pool state were removed. No secret key, signed transaction payload, or private wallet data is present.
